Vendored pyenet and ENet
========================

BattleSpades builds its enet Python extension directly from pinned sources:

- pyenet tag 1.3.17, commit 1bd4e84b4d6bcfb171c11572a1b7b770123e3771
- ENet tag v1.3.17, commit e0e7045b7e056b454b5093cb34df49dc4cee0bee
- https://github.com/piqueserver/pyenet
- https://github.com/lsalzman/enet

Wrapper changes are limited to the upstream Cython language_level=2 directive
and a noexcept annotation on ENet's packet-free callback required by Cython 3.
pyenet is BSD-3-Clause and ENet is MIT; full licenses remain beside sources.
